query:
-- Get all billing items for these 6 customers to see what platforms they're billed on
SELECT 
  bi.externalId,
  bi.contactName,
  bi.description,
  bi.lineAmount,
  bi.billingPlatform,
  bi.invoiceNumber,
  bi.customerExternalId
FROM billing_items bi
WHERE bi.customerExternalId IN ('C0009','C0016','C0022','C0132','C0166','C0229')
ORDER BY bi.customerExternalId, bi.billingPlatform, bi.lineAmount DESC;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dgdAH8nVC5Tv7xw.94a9498ba7da --database SkibUwiSvPndpvTSJv52KC --execute 
-- Get all billing items for these 6 customers to see what platforms they're billed on
SELECT 
  bi.externalId,
  bi.contactName,
  bi.description,
  bi.lineAmount,
  bi.billingPlatform,
  bi.invoiceNumber,
  bi.customerExternalId
FROM billing_items bi
WHERE bi.customerExternalId IN ('C0009','C0016','C0022','C0132','C0166','C0229')
ORDER BY bi.customerExternalId, bi.billingPlatform, bi.lineAmount DESC;
